findings.message: Hardcoded secret `api_secret_key` committed to source. A default value of "super-secret-key-do-not-share" embedded in code becomes the production secret on any deployment that forgets to override APP_API_SECRET_KEY, and the literal will be permanently exposed in git history. This violates the file's own docstring ("Never hardcode config.") and constitutes OWASP A02 (Cryptographic Failures) / A05 (Security Misconfiguration) — secret material in version control.
findings.suggestion: Remove the default literal and require the value from the environment, e.g. `api_secret_key: SecretStr = Field(...)` (no default) so startup fails fast if APP_API_SECRET_KEY is unset, and use pydantic's SecretStr so it is not logged. Rotate the leaked value and purge it from git history.
